## [1:51:42 - 1:54:43]

and an example to really cement your understanding of this so if you're selling accountant training services and you partner with an accounting software company and you serve the same people and can help each other while not competing with core business offers so if I'm selling training to help accountants sell more well my market, my niche is their accountants who else is targeting accountants? Well accounting software companies like FreshBooks, Zero, stuff like that now are we competitive? No because I'm selling consulting and training and the software companies are selling their software so we're not competing with each other yet we're still serving the same people so when that sort of relationship exists it is prime for a joint venture opportunity in a joint venture webinar and you basically want to make sure that you're serving the same people but you're not competing on core business offers and this strategy doesn't work until you have built up a bit of a track record and some proven results because most JVs won't trust you until you can show proof. You know when a JV is emailing their people for you basically how a JV webinar works is instead of you emailing other people and saying hey come on this webinar somebody else is emailing their people and they're saying hey you should get on this guy Sam's webinar and so we're leveraging somebody else's list somebody else's contacts and somebody else's reputation in the industry and it's a very powerful way to grow by doing that because you get to leverage someone else's list and network and everything but people aren't going to give you that opportunity if they're scared that it might ruin their reputation because a reputation is everything when it comes to your customers and everything so the last thing someone wants to do is do a JV with someone who they don't know and who doesn't have a track record because if it blows up then they're going to look bad in front of their customers and that's going to cost them a lot of money so that's why you need to have this before you build up to this so if you don't have this right now that's totally fine you don't need to worry about this method however if you are ready to do this then awesome you should definitely try it out it's a very powerful method so a lot of people think that JVs is just about making money and when they pitch the JV partner they say hey look I can make you all this money and true money is important people definitely care about it but people care about their reputation before money because no one wants to do a JV promotion for someone they don't know and risk their reputation which has taken them a long time to build up just for some quick money no one

does that so it's really important to remember that the reputation and delivering value is of more importance than money so when you start conversations with potential JV partners keep that in mind
